stop_boundary: Proves Login clientbound login_compression packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official compressionThreshold=0 fixture only; do not infer compression negotiation policy, connection compression activation, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
